OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jan-27-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Litigation
Off Calendar Dec-15-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Patrick Co of Co Law Firm telephone number 415-426-3553 for Plaintiff.
Lee Szor of Fox Rothschild LLP telephone number 415-364-5440 for Defendant.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CYPRESS SECURITY LLC'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Litigation is denied. Cypress fails to provide any evidence that Tupas signed the Conditions of Employment Agreement and Tupas has no recollection of having done so. Even if Tupas did sign the agreement, the agreement can fairly be read to exclude from arbitration claims based on race and age discrimination. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Irene L. Tofft, CSR #12913. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2015 Continued To Jan-27-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
